hooks.prompt: If this call_site_tool operation published/vouched an item to make it publicly visible, and no validation/quality-check operation was performed on the same item earlier in this session, return systemMessage: 'Published without validation. Consider running a validation/quality-check operation for E-E-A-T trust signals — validation adds creativeWorkStatus and editorialNote to JSON-LD structured data, strengthening Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness signals for search engines.' Otherwise no output.
